segments.text: Give ear, O heavens, and I will speak; And hear, O earth, the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Let my teaching drop as the rain, My speech distill as the dew, As raindrops on the tender herb, And as showers on the grass.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: I proclaim the name of the Lord: Ascribe greatness to our God.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He is the Rock, His work is perfect; For all His ways are justice, A God of truth and without injustice; Righteous and upright is He.
They have corrupted themselves; They are not His children, Because of their blemish: A perverse and crooked generation.
Do you thus deal with the Lord, O foolish and unwise people? Is He not your Father, who bought you? Has He not made you and established you?
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Remember the days of old, Consider the years of many generations. Ask your father, and he will show you; Your elders, and they will tell you:
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: When the Most High divided their inheritance to the nations, When He separated the sons of Adam, He set the boundaries of the peoples According to the number of the children of Israel.
For the Lord's portion is His people; Jacob is the place of His inheritance.
He found him in a desert land And in the wasteland, a howling wilderness; He encircled him, He instructed him, He kept him as the apple of His eye.
And when the Lord saw it, He spurned them, Because of the provocation of His sons and His daughters.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will hide My face from them, I will see what their end will be, For they are a perverse generation, Children in whom is no faith.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So Moses came with Joshua the son of Nun and spoke all the words of this song in the hearing of the people.
Moses finished speaking all these words to all Israel,
Set your hearts on all the words which I testify among you today, which you shall command your children to be careful to observe—all the words of this law.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: For it is not a futile thing for you, because it is your life, and by this word you shall prolong your days in the land which you cross over the Jordan to possess.
segments.speaker: Moses

verses.title: Moses to Die on Mount Nebo

segments.text: Then the Lord spoke to Moses that very same day, saying:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Go up this mountain of the Abarim, Mount Nebo, which is in the land of Moab, across from Jericho; view the land of Canaan, which I give to the children of Israel as a possession;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And die on the mountain which you ascend, and be gathered to your people, just as Aaron your brother died on Mount Hor and was gathered to his people;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Because you trespassed against Me among the children of Israel at the waters of Meribah Kadesh, in the Wilderness of Zin, because you did not hallow Me in the midst of the children of Israel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Yet you shall see the land before you, though you shall not go there, into the land which I am giving to the children of Israel.
segments.speaker: God
